name: Kindergarten Painting & Mixed Media — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for color mixing, marks, collage, and material care. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with color mixing, marks, collage, and material care.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: color mixing, marks, collage, and material care
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about color mixing, marks, collage, and material care through a close look at color mixing, marks, collage, and material care.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about color mixing, marks, collage, and material care through a guided practice with color mixing, marks, collage, and material care.
